author: jordanhandy
description: Upload pasted images from your clipboard to Cloudinary.

manifest.author: Jordan Handy
manifest.description: This plugin uploads the media files in your clipboard (or drag and drop) to Cloudinary as unsigned uploads
manifest.name: Cloudinary Uploader

name: Cloudinary Uploader

releases.author: jordanhandy
releases.description:
This is the first release I feel is feature-complete when compared to what I had originally envisioned for it.

## What's Changed
* add failure message if required fields are not set by @jordanhandy in https://github.com/jordanhandy/obsidian-cloudinary-uploader/pull/15
* Add commands with ability to mass upload assets by @jordanhandy in https://github.com/jordanhandy/obsidian-cloudinary-uploader/pull/17


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jordanhandy/obsidian-cloudinary-uploader/compare/0.3.1...1.0.0

releases.author: jordanhandy
releases.description:
- You can now specify a subfolder per asset type
  - Note, this will be ignored if you have a default folder already set within your Cloudinary upload preset

releases.author: jordanhandy
releases.description:
# New Features
1. Ability to upload more file types
  -  Video
  - Audio
  - Raw files (non-media)
2. Now supports drag-n-drop uploading
3. Choose which file types you want to be uploaded to Cloudinary.  Some, all, or none

releases.author: jordanhandy
releases.description:
Added the following feature:
- Ability to add a default transformation string for all uploads (comma-delimited)
See [Cloudinary documentation](https://cloudinary.com/documentation/transformation_reference) to understand supported transformations

releases.author: jordanhandy
releases.description: - Add "f_auto" toggle to be added to generated URLs - #4

releases.author: jordanhandy
releases.description: Fix line counting for replacing text, and removed error on plaintext paste

releases.author: jordanhandy
releases.description: Fix issue where pasting text shows error
